name: Calculateur Rendement Actions
desc: Calculez Total return (%) = ((Final price + Dividends - Initial price) / Initial price) × 100. Exemple: Buy at €50, sell at €62, dividends €1.50 = Return = 27%....
description: Calculez Total return (%) = ((Final price + Dividends - Initial price) / Initial price) × 100. Exemple: Buy at €50, sell at €62, dividends €1.50 = Return = 27%....
seo_description: Calculez Total return (%) = ((Final price + Dividends - Initial price) / Initial price) × 100. Exemple: Buy at €50, sell at €62, dividends €1.50 = Return = 27%.
example_label: Calculezting Total return on stock bought at €45.50, sold at €58.75, with €3.dividends received.
result_context: The retorno_pct of {retorno_pct}% is your Total return including dividends. The ganancia of {ganancia} is profit per share.
formula_display: Total Return% = [(Sale Price - Purchase Price + Dividends) ÷ Purchase Price] × 100
mistakes: Forgetting to include dividends in Total return calculetion
Not accounting for transaction costs and taxes on gains
Comparing returns without considering holding period
